branch.branch_summary: After v6.4.0, run a runtime-backed frontier review for v6.5 Mission Control / Human Recognition redesign before opening implementation work.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v6.4 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Maintain v6.4.0 as the Pre-Implementation Quality Gate baseline and choose the next AOF frontier through runtime-backed review, with Mission Control / Human Recognition redesign as the leading candidate.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: After v6.4.0, run a runtime-backed frontier review for v6.5 Mission Control / Human Recognition redesign before opening implementation work.
